hero.eyebrow: GS Law Firm · Est. 2023 · Kondapur, Hyderabad
hero.line1: Everyone’s there for your next case.
hero.line2: Who’s there for the one after?

intro.body: Founded in 2023 in Kondapur, Hyderabad, the firm undertakes criminal and civil matters as a solo-advocate practice, quietly, attentively, and with the same hand on every brief.

practice.heading:
Areas
of work
practice.lede: All areas, one advocate. Each matter receives the same attention from first hearing to final order: no handing off, no rotating juniors, no surprises on counsel.

approach.heading: Three things we hold to.
approach.lede: The razorbill, our quiet emblem, returns to the same cliff colony year after year. We borrow the metaphor with intent: continuity is the point.

personal.title: Personal counsel
personal.body: Your file is mine end to end. The same advocate who reads your brief is the one who argues your matter, and the one you call afterwards.

discreet.title: Discreet representation
discreet.body: Most clients arrive at a difficult chapter. We keep the room small, the calls measured, and the documentation tight.

continuity.title: Continuity beyond the verdict
continuity.body: A judgment is rarely the last page. We stay on for execution, appeals, and the quieter matters that follow.

contact.heading: Send a brief note.
contact.lede: Tell us, in a few sentences, what you’re dealing with. We respond within one working day, usually the same day.

fields.name: Name
fields.messagePh: A few sentences about the matter, nothing confidential at this stage.

contact.disclaim: Submitting this form does not create an attorney–client relationship. Nothing herein constitutes legal advice.

success.title: Note received.
success.body: We’ll reach out within one working day. For urgent matters, call +91 99638 47704.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please call +91 99638 47704 or write to sunitha@sindhole.com.
errors.rateLimit: You’ve sent several enquiries recently. Please try again in an hour.
errors.challenge: We couldn’t verify this submission. Please refresh the page and try again, or call +91 99638 47704.

about.heading: A small practice, kept small on purpose.

symbol.heading: The razorbill returns to the same cliff colony year after year, mating for life, hewing close to family.
symbol.body1: It is a quiet bird, not a striking one. It does not announce itself. It is, however, reliable in a way that few seabirds are.
symbol.body2: We took the metaphor on purpose. The work of a small law practice, done well, is the work of returning, to the same client, the same court, the same files, with the same attention as the first day.

story.label: Founding · 2023
story.p1: The firm opened its doors in 2023 in Kondapur, Hyderabad. The premise was unfashionable: one advocate, working on one file at a time, available for as long as the matter lasts, and where the relationship calls for it, well beyond.
story.p2: Adv. Aitha Sunitha spent more than a decade in the trenches of criminal and civil practice before founding the firm. The decision to go out alone was not made lightly. It was made because, in her view, the larger the room a client's file passes through, the more often something quiet but important gets lost in the crossing.
story.p3: The firm takes a small number of matters at any one time. It is not a question of preference; it is a question of mathematics. There is one set of hands on every file, and those hands have a finite week.
story.p4: This site exists to make finding us straightforward. It is not a billboard. We have no rankings to claim and no testimonials to print. What we have is the willingness to sit with you and decide, plainly, whether we are the right firm for what you are dealing with.

contactPage.heading: Three ways to reach us.
contactPage.lede: We answer the phone between 10 and 18 IST, Monday through Saturday. Outside those hours, the form and WhatsApp are read first thing the next working day.

phone.label: By Phone · 01
phone.note: Direct to the advocate, not a desk. If we don’t pick up, we are in court. Leave a message and we will return your call by close of business.

email.label: By Email · 02
email.note: For longer enquiries or sharing documents. Please do not send anything confidential or privileged in the first message. We will reply with a secure channel.

inPerson.label: In Person · 03
inPerson.note: Kondapur, Hyderabad 500 084 · Telangana, India. Appointments preferred. Most consults can be done by phone or video first.

privacy.heading: Privacy notice.
privacy.lede: This notice describes what we collect when you visit this site or send us a message, why we collect it, and what we do with it.

collect.heading: What we collect
collect.body: When you submit the contact form, we collect the name, phone number, email address and message you provide. Server logs may record your IP address, browser user agent and the time of the request. We do not use third-party advertising cookies. The site uses a privacy-respecting analytics signal to count visits; no personal profile is built.

use.heading: How we use it
use.body: Enquiry data is used solely to respond to your enquiry and, where you become a client, to discharge our professional obligations. We do not sell, rent or share enquiry data with any third party for marketing. Aggregated, anonymous traffic figures may be referenced internally to improve the site.

retention.heading: How long we keep it
retention.body: Unresolved enquiries are retained for up to 90 days, after which they are deleted. Where an attorney–client relationship is formed, file retention follows the rules of the Bar Council of India and applicable law, typically seven years from the close of the matter.

rights.heading: Your rights
rights.body: You may ask us to confirm what information we hold about you, to correct it, or to delete it. Where the law allows deletion, we will action the request within thirty days. Write to sunitha@sindhole.com to make any such request.

contact.heading: Questions
contact.body: If anything in this notice is unclear, write to sunitha@sindhole.com and we will respond within one working day.

disclaimerPage.heading: Disclaimer.
disclaimerPage.p1: The Bar Council of India does not permit advocates to solicit work or advertise. By entering this site, the user acknowledges that they are seeking information about GS Law Firm of their own accord and that no part of this site constitutes advertisement, personal communication, solicitation, invitation or inducement of any sort whatsoever from the firm or any of its members.
disclaimerPage.p2: The information provided on this site is for general informational purposes only and should not be construed as legal advice or a substitute for it. GS Law Firm does not assume any responsibility for the consequences of any action taken on the basis of information provided herein. No attorney–client relationship is created by accessing this site or by sending a message through it.
disclaimerPage.p3: By proceeding further, the user agrees to release, discharge and hold GS Law Firm harmless from any claim arising out of the use of any information available on this site.
disclaimerPage.p4: Any reference to a specific area of law on this site is general in nature and not exhaustive. Outcomes in legal matters depend on the facts of each case, the applicable law, and the court before which the matter is heard. No representation, warranty or undertaking is made or implied that any particular result will be obtained.
disclaimerPage.p5: If you do not agree with any part of this notice, please leave the site. If you require legal advice on a specific matter, we encourage you to call us on +91 99638 47704 or to write to sunitha@sindhole.com. A privileged channel will then be opened with you on that matter.

practiceIndex.heading: Areas of work.
practiceIndex.lede: All areas, one advocate. Each matter receives the same attention from first hearing to final order: no handing off, no rotating juniors, no surprises on counsel.
practiceIndex.footnote: Don’t see your matter listed? Many cases sit between two areas. Send a brief note and we’ll tell you whether we are the right firm for it.

cta.body: A first conversation, by phone or in office, with no obligation.

practiceDetail.footer: Every matter is taken on after a frank first conversation. We tell you, plainly, whether we are the right firm for it, and where to look if we are not.

footer.blurb: A solo-advocate practice in Kondapur, Hyderabad. Founded 2023.
footer.disclaim: As per the rules of the Bar Council of India, advocates are not permitted to solicit work or advertise. The contents of this site are for informational purposes only and do not constitute legal advice or create any attorney–client relationship.

disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer.
disclaimer.body1: The Bar Council of India does not permit advertisement or solicitation by Advocates in any form. By proceeding further and clicking ‘I Agree’, the user acknowledges the following: (1) there has been no advertisement, personal communication, solicitation, invitation or inducement of any sort whatsoever from GS Law Firm or any of its members to solicit any work through this website; (2) the user wishes to gain more information about GS Law Firm for his/her own information and use; (3) the information provided on this website is solely available at the user’s request for informational purposes only.
disclaimer.body2: (4) no material/information provided on this website should be construed as legal advice; (5) GS Law Firm shall not be liable for consequences of any action taken by relying on the material/information provided on this website.
